message:
beads: register bd-olste ext4 hidden encryption xattr parity task

Adds a new open P2 task bead tracking the port of ext4's hidden
encryption xattr parity surface. No code changes — this is a JSONL-only
beads registration to capture the follow-up work item so agents picking
up ready work via 'br ready' can see and claim it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
